title: HISS AND TELL
description:
HISS & TELL – Code the Talk, Talk the Code! 🐍🎤
Join us for HISS & TELL, an exciting skill-development workshop organized by the ISTE Student Chapter, College of Engineering Attingal, designed to help students build confidence in communication and take their first steps into the world of programming.
The event features two engaging sessions that combine essential soft skills with practical technical knowledge. Begin the day by learning the art of effective public speaking, overcoming stage fear, and communicating with confidence. Then, dive into the fundamentals of project development using Python through a beginner-friendly, hands-on coding session led by experienced student mentors.
Whether you're looking to improve your presentation skills, explore programming, or simply gain valuable knowledge for your academic and professional journey, HISS & TELL offers the perfect platform to learn, interact, and grow.
Event Highlights
🎙️ Public Speaking & Confidence Building Session
💻 Introduction to Project Development with Python
🤝 Interactive Learning Environment
🚀 Beginner-Friendly and Hands-On Experience
📜 Participation Certificate
🎯 Networking with Like-Minded Students
Date: 13 September
Time: 9:00 AM
Venue: SDPK Hall & FOSS Lab, College of Engineering Attingal
Seats are limited, so register early and secure your spot!
